examples: Every large house is a real feudal fortress made, it is true, only of sun-baked clay, but with battlements, turrets, loopholes, drawbridges, etc.
MANDELSON throws PURNELL from the battlements.
MCBRIDE is thrown from the Downing Street battlements.
Having two young kids, he has erected 300 feet of safety battlements along the cliff.
Inland, the battlements of dramatic Nakhal Fort are ripe for a mock battle before young soldiers recover with a picnic in the surrounding date plantations.
